titleStmt.title: SII 39.260: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 260.

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of land located in the village Yalamaṅgala to the servants of the temple of Ādimūrti at Śrimūshnam by Venkaṭarāvu Kōnēṭayya, the agent of Koṇḍāmanāyani Krishnappannāyanayya and the temple authorities.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1522 Agunēṭi plava saṁvatsara phālguṇa śu 10lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrīvīraveṁkaṭapatirāyadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru penugoṁḍa nagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai prithivi sāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmadakhi
lāṁḍakōṭi braṁhmāṁḍanāyakulayina śrīmuṣṇaṁ Ādivarāhasvāmi kōvila śrībhaṁḍāraṁvāruṁnu koṁḍamanāyani kriṣṇappanāyanayyavāri kāryakartalayi
na veṁkaṭarāvu kōnēṭayyavāruṁnu kaṭaḍaśēśina maryāda śāsanamu Ādimūrti kōvela yeṁberumānāraḍiyārlalōnu śēvagālu 141 ki pūrvamaṁdu Acyutappa nāya
niṁgāru yaḷamaṁgalagrāmaṁ kaṭṭaḍaśēśināru ganaka Āgrāmāna pūrvamayina gavimānyasthānamānyāluṁnnu paḍigasāni kaṭṭaḍaśēśina mānya guṁṭalu 200nnu kākakaricciki ka
ṭṭaḍaśēśina mānyaṁ guṁṭṭalu 40 nni kāka Āgrāmāna nilicina polaṁ kaliginadi 141 śevugālavāruṁnu sarigā paṁcukonivalasina payirlu meṭṭukoni Ādimūrtiśāvatappakuṁ
ḍā śēviṁcukoni savukhyāna vuṁḍakalavārutiruvūralu tirunāḷlaku maṁṭapaṁ capparaṁ peṭṭiṁcci pūrvamaryādanu carapuṁnu śāyakalavāru teru tirunāḷakuṁnnu samudrā
tirunāḷakuṁnu śīma A(O)ppaṁdaṁ manuṣyula viḍuvakalavāru kovilalō śēviṁcanivāri śēvakula mānyaphalaṁ kōvilaku mōdalupeṭṭakalavāru yī śāsanaṁ vrāśina maryā
daku yavaṁḍu tappi vighnaṁ śēśinānu Ā vighnaṁ śēśinavāṁḍu nūṭanalubhaivoka bhōgālavāṁḍla miṁḍlalō kāṭuka pōṁkalavāṁḍū gaṁgātīramaṁdu tamatallitaṁḍrini go
ṁtu kōsina pāpānapōgalavāḍu
Digital edition of SII 39.260 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
